summary: TaxiG Chat Feature - Iteration 5 Testing Complete. All backend chat API tests passed (14/14). Frontend chat UI verified on both driver and client sides. Chat toggle button, fullscreen panel, message display, send functionality, and unread badge all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat API endpoints correctly implemented: POST /chat/{course_id}/send, GET /chat/{course_id}/messages, GET /chat/{course_id}/unread
Message read-marking works correctly when other party fetches messages
Chat correctly blocked for completed courses (returns 400)
Authorization properly enforced - only course participants can access chat
ChatPanel.jsx is a well-structured reusable component with proper data-testid attributes
ChatToggleButton correctly shows unread badge with polling (3s interval)
Navy+Orange theme correctly applied: client messages orange (right), driver messages navy (left)
Sender name displayed correctly for messages from other party
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during testing via backend API and Playwright UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat feature fully implemented and tested. Active test course: b04c5492-3017-40bd-949c-0d6ed2cb8ca9 between Jean Dupont (client) and TAXI001/Jean Martin (driver) with multiple test messages. Chat available only during assigned/in_progress status. Polling: 2s for messages when open, 3s for unread count when closed.

endpoints_tested: POST /api/chat/{course_id}/send - sends message with sender_name, sender_type, timestamp
GET /api/chat/{course_id}/messages - returns all messages, marks as read
GET /api/chat/{course_id}/unread - returns unread count for current user
details.read_marking: Messages marked as read when fetched by other party

details.chat_toggle_button: Visible in course panel next to timer, has data-testid='chat-toggle-btn'
details.message_display: Driver messages on right (orange), client messages on left (navy) with sender name
details.send_button: Orange send button, disabled when empty

details.chat_toggle_button: Visible next to phone button in chauffeur info section
details.unread_badge: Red pulsing badge shows unread count
details.message_display: Client messages on right (orange), driver messages on left (navy) with sender name 'Jean Martin'

details.bidirectional_messaging: Messages sent from driver visible to client and vice versa
details.real_time_polling: 2-second polling for new messages when chat open
details.unread_polling: 3-second polling for unread count when chat closed
details.sound_notification: Audio element present for new message notification
